name: Tuna Casserole
recipeIngredient: 3 oz Chow mein noodles in the can
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the cream of mushroom soup and water.
2. Add the rest of the ingredients, reserving a few noodles for garnish.
3. Pour into a buttered baking dish.
4. Top with reserved noodles.
5. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 20-30 minutes.
